name: @n1crack/orgchart-vue
//: exports point at source during development so the workspace resolves without a build step; publishConfig.exports replaces them with the built dist paths at publish time.
//dependencies: orgchart-core is a DIRECT dependency, not merely a transitive one through orgchart: this package's own published .d.ts names types declared there (NodeData, and through it every event payload), so a consumer's TypeScript has to be able to resolve it. Under a strict node_modules layout a transitive dependency is not resolvable from here.
